prompt: Write a complete ELN entry for an IHC experiment. We performed immunohistochemistry on FFPE colon cancer sections to detect Ki67 (proliferation marker). Primary antibody: anti-Ki67 rabbit monoclonal (Abcam ab16667, lot GR3256900-1, 1:200 dilution). Secondary: HRP-conjugated goat anti-rabbit (Jackson ImmunoResearch 111-035-144, lot 142565). Antigen retrieval: citrate buffer pH 6.0, 95°C for 20 min. Detection: DAB chromogen, hematoxylin counterstain. Tissue: FFPE blocks from surgical resection (patient cohort 2024-IHC, blocks processed 2026-02-10). Observed strong nuclear Ki67 staining in ~40% of tumor cells.
